name: stackra/foundation
purpose: Shared kernel for every Stackra package: module service-provider base, cross-cutting contracts, correlation-id middleware, guard clauses, and testable clock.
capabilities: Cross-cutting contracts (HasErrorCode, HasContext, HasUserMessage, Correlatable, Clock)
Testable Clock abstraction with SystemClock default
when_to_use: Every Stackra backend package depends on it — the shared kernel every other package composes from.
when_not_to_use: For persistence, migrations, or repositories, reach for stackra/database or stackra/crud instead.
